component.name: Tunneler
component.summary: Install, connect, test and diagnose Linux VPN profiles

description.p: Tunneler is a guided Linux VPN connection assistant for WireGuard, OpenVPN, L2TP/IPsec, IKEv2 and OpenConnect profiles managed by NetworkManager.
Renames the application to Tunneler and adds a native or fully included dark file browser with bundled Tk/Tcl and FUSE-free AppImage startup.
Fixes profile refresh completion, adds timeout recovery, introduces a dark interface and replaces the application icon.
